name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
~ ✧.* inspired by The Tinker, written by Pollypenname.

Katsuki frequently needs his gear and hero equipment fixed. Lucky for him, a new student who is experienced with engineering from his father being an engineer had joined…but not, does he push Katsuki’s buttons.

MLM + hatred first off.
creator: Whimsicaldizz
